title: CSB Organises Programme on Quantum Technologies and Post-Quantum Security | Cyber Security Brunei
description: Official Cyber Security Brunei (CSB) press release. CSB, with Malaysia's National Cyber Security Agency (NACSA) and the Cryptography Technology and Management Centre (PTPKM), hosted the first Post-Quantum Technology and Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) Workshop. The two-day programme gathered ~60 representatives from security/defence, government, regulators, banks and universities to strengthen national understanding of quantum technologies, assess Brunei Darussalam's readiness on PQC, and align national effort towards it.

title: Cyber Security Brunei hosted a two-day sharing session on Quantum Technology and Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) on 18 and 19 November 2025
description: Facebook post by CSB describing the same 18-19 November 2025 sharing session on Quantum Technology and Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) held with Malaysia's PTPKM and NACSA. Social media channel (excluded as non-institutional medium; duplicate of the CSB press release).

title: Cyber Security Brunei (CSB) - The GFCE
